# Consentik GDPR Cookie Banner

## Consentik GDPR Cookie Banner

- [Welcome to Consentik GDPR/CCPA Cookie Banner](https://docs.consentik.com/welcome-to-consentik-gdpr-ccpa-cookie-banner.md)
- [GDPR Setup Checklist](https://docs.consentik.com/gdpr-setup-checklist.md)
- [How the app function](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/how-the-app-function.md)
- [Design the banner](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/design-the-banner.md)
- [Edit text on the banner](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/edit-text-on-the-banner.md)
- [Privacy policy page generating](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/privacy-policy-page-generating.md)
- [Positioning your banner](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/positioning-your-banner.md)
- [Restrict banner for specific regions only](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/restrict-banner-for-specific-regions-only.md)
- [Browser cookies lifetime](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/browser-cookies-lifetime.md)
- [Advanced Settings](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/advanced-settings.md)
- [Translations](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/translations.md)
- [Language Selector on Banner](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/translations/language-selector-on-banner.md)
- [Re-opener Configuration](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/re-opener-configuration.md)
- [Glass Effect](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/glass-effect.md)
- [Banner Button Position](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/banner-button-position.md)
- [Show category options on banner](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/show-category-options-on-banner.md)
- [Decline Button Customization](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/decline-button-customization.md): Consentik Cookie for Shopify gives you full control over the Decline button’s appearance and behavior, ensuring your store’s cookie banner and privacy experience are both user-friendly and compliant.
- [Preferences popup config](https://docs.consentik.com/settings/preferences-popup-config.md)
- [Block User Interaction Until Consent](https://docs.consentik.com/block-user-interaction-until-consent.md): Consentik Cookie for Shopify offers a powerful feature called Block User Interaction Until Consent, allowing you to display an overlay that prevents users from interacting with your store’s content un
- [Data Sale Opt-Out Feature](https://docs.consentik.com/data-sale-opt-out-feature.md): Consentik Cookie for Shopify includes a dedicated Data Sale Opt-Out feature, helping your store comply with privacy regulations such as the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and similar US laws.
- [Managing cookies](https://docs.consentik.com/manage-cookies-and-categories/managing-cookies.md)
- [Managing categories](https://docs.consentik.com/manage-cookies-and-categories/managing-categories.md)
- [Cookie Auto-Scanner and Auto-Transfer](https://docs.consentik.com/manage-cookies-and-categories/cookie-auto-scanner-and-auto-transfer.md)
- [Import & Export Cookies](https://docs.consentik.com/manage-cookies-and-categories/import-and-export-cookies.md)
- [Consent log](https://docs.consentik.com/consent-log.md)
- [Consent Response Statistics Page](https://docs.consentik.com/consent-response-statistics-page.md)
- [Pricing](https://docs.consentik.com/pricing.md)
- [Setup Data Request Management](https://docs.consentik.com/data-request-management/setup-data-request-management.md)
- [Email Template Configuration](https://docs.consentik.com/data-request-management/email-template-configuration.md)
- [Data Rights Page Configuration](https://docs.consentik.com/data-request-management/data-rights-page-configuration.md)
- [Data Request Log](https://docs.consentik.com/data-request-management/data-request-log.md)
- [Tips for Effective Use and Compliance](https://docs.consentik.com/data-request-management/tips-for-effective-use-and-compliance.md)
- [Guide to Complying with Google’s Consent Management Requirements](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/guide-to-complying-with-googles-consent-management-requirements.md)
- [IAB TCF 2.2 Compliance](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/iab-tcf-2.2-compliance.md): Learn how to seamlessly integrate IAB TCF v2.2 with Consentik Cookie.
- [Google Consent Mode V2 Integrated](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/google-consent-mode-v2-integrated.md)
- [How to Integrate Google Consent Mode V2 on Your Shopify Checkout Page](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/how-to-integrate-google-consent-mode-v2-on-your-shopify-checkout-page.md)
- [Microsoft Universal Event Tracking Consent Mode Integrated](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/microsoft-universal-event-tracking-consent-mode-integrated.md)
- [Sklik Retargeting Consent Integrated](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/sklik-retargeting-consent-integrated.md)
- [Auto-blocker tracking scripts](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/auto-blocker-tracking-scripts.md)
- [Global Privacy Control (GPC) Signal](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/global-privacy-control-gpc-signal.md)
- [Checkout Banner Block](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/checkout-banner-block.md)
- [Headless Store Integration](https://docs.consentik.com/integrations/headless-store-integration.md): Consentik Cookie now supports seamless integration with headless Shopify stores built using Hydrogen. This powerful feature enables you to deliver a fully customized cookie consent experience—even if
- [Which consent type should I select for Google Consent Mode Settings?](https://docs.consentik.com/faq/which-consent-type-should-i-select-for-google-consent-mode-settings.md)
- [What should I do if "default consent" is duplicated?](https://docs.consentik.com/faq/what-should-i-do-if-default-consent-is-duplicated.md)

## Consentik GDPR Cookie Banner for Wix

- [Re-open Button for Cookie Banner](https://docs.consentik.com/consentik-cookie-wix/settings/re-open-button-for-cookie-banner.md)
- [Preferences Popup Options](https://docs.consentik.com/consentik-cookie-wix/settings/preferences-popup-options.md)
- [Advanced Settings](https://docs.consentik.com/consentik-cookie-wix/settings/advanced-settings.md)

- [Guide to Complying with Google’s Consent Management Requirements](https://docs.consentik.com/consentik-cookie-wix/integrations/guide-to-complying-with-googles-consent-management-requirements.md)
- [IAB TCF 2.2 Compliance](https://docs.consentik.com/consentik-cookie-wix/integrations/iab-tcf-2.2-compliance.md): Learn how to seamlessly integrate IAB TCF v2.2 with Consentik Cookie.
- [Google Consent Mode V2 Integrated](https://docs.consentik.com/consentik-cookie-wix/integrations/google-consent-mode-v2-integrated.md)

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.consentik.com/welcome-to-consentik-gdpr-ccpa-cookie-banner.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
